allow: Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import telegram; print\(telegram.__version__\); import httpx; print\(httpx.__version__\); import anyio; print\(anyio.__version__\); import sys; print\(sys.version\)")

Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import telegram; print\('telegram:', telegram.__version__\); import httpx; print\('httpx:', httpx.__version__\); from importlib.metadata import version; print\('anyio:', version\('anyio'\)\); print\('httpcore:', version\('httpcore'\)\)")
